summary: The video captures a street scene viewed from inside a vehicle, showing a yellow bus traveling ahead in the same lane as the recording vehicle. Other cars are present on both sides of the road, including a white car passing by on the left side.

events_timeline.event: A yellow bus travels ahead in the same lane as the recording vehicle.

uncertainties: The identity of the white car passing by is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
